title: rubus hirtus var. lengyelii
intro: Rubus hirtus var. lengyelii, also known as the Lengyel's Raspberry or Lengyel's Bramble, is a variety of bramble shrub native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's berries, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Rubus hirtus var. lengyelii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
